scripts.typecheck: tsgo -p ./tsconfig.json --noEmit && npm run typecheck --workspace @4cimageseg/frontend && npm run typecheck --workspace @4cimageseg/contracts
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @4cimageseg/contracts && npm run build --workspace @4cimageseg/frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:contracts && npm run test:frontend && npm run verify:training-models
